description_long: This object is a compact, rotary-cylinder grenade launcher, visually reminiscent of the Milkor MGL or similar models. It features a prominent revolving drum magazine capable of holding multiple rounds, a robust frame, and a short, thick barrel. The launcher is equipped with a pistol grip and a forward vertical grip for stability during firing. The overall finish is matte black, with metallic and polymer components visible, and the design is utilitarian, built for durability and rapid operation. The sighting system appears minimal, with a simple rail or notch, and the muzzle is unadorned, lacking any visible suppressor or brake. The object is compact and designed for portability, suitable for use in urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, black rotary-cylinder grenade launcher with a drum magazine, pistol grip, and short barrel, built for tactical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular opening of the barrel and the front of the drum magazine.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the launcher, the revolving drum, pistol grip, and forward vertical grip.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the drum magazine and the rear of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the launcher’s profile, including the drum, grips, and barrel.
